mods.name: SalJam_Bench_Separation
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Manufacturer only has Dangerous Horizons craftables

mods.name: SalJam_Dangerous_Horizons_QOL
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Added additional Advanced versions of tools (Lithium Knife, Axe, Pickaxe, Sickle and Sledge hammer, workshop scanner and extractor) all with increases in stats. 2 new purchaseable workshop suits and backpacks. Increased output versions of oil pump, refiner and charging station. Added multiple exotic recipies in both chemistry bench and Eden trader. Added raptor talent and  recipe to create Uranium rods.

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Hauler
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 18 inventory slots, 3 heavy slots, but is slower by 10%

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Lightened
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 6 inventory slots, 1 heavy slot, is 20% quicker and uses less fuel with + 10k fuel tank

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Strengthened
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 12 inventory slots, 2 heavy slots, + 5k fuel tank and is 10% quicker

mods.name: SalJam_Speeder_Nuclear
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: The speeder has 12 inventory slots, 2 heavy slots, 60k fuel tank, is 50% quicker and uses Uranium Infused Oil (recipe included)

mods.name: SalJam_Roaming_NPCs
mods.author: SalJam
mods.description: Added random spawns of TPS soldiers over the map. Some will drop higher end loot
